mapper.select: select IS_ALLOWED from MEMBERS M left join MEMBERS_ROLES MR on M.MEMBERS_NO = MR.MEMBERS_NO left join ROLES R on MR.ROLES_ID = R.ROLES_ID left join ROLE_RESOURCES RR on R.ROLES_ID = RR.ROLES_ID left join URL_RESOURCES UR on RR.URL_RESOURCES_ID = UR.URL_RESOURCES_ID where M.MEMBERS_NO = #{userNO} and #{url} LIKE UR.URL_PATTERN || '%'
